evaluated_on: complete five-question paired baseline (EXP-107 full_fidelity 5/5 vs EXP-108 lean_adaptive 5/5, frozen BTF-3 rows, sealed-replay bundle, seed 0)

all_safety_invariants_pass.evidence: PR #127 protection tests green at head; research-before-psychology runtime invariant; no numeric actors in lean (grep+test); ensure_outcome_pathway validated on every prepared model; no empty rollouts; no generic terminal guess (AST-pinned no-0.5); honest statuses preserved under the forecast-availability contract

controlled_cache_tests_show_no_semantic_.evidence: isolated caching parity gate: caches on vs off byte-identical decisions/distributions/statuses/censuses with decision calls 70->4 (35 particles, 4 distinct situations, 101 hits, 0 invalidated); sequential == bounded-concurrent identity test; 0 invalidated cache hits across the live arm; every reuse carries explain_equivalence()

no_catastrophic_forecast_degradation_on_.evidence: paired-5 Brier: lean 0.337 vs full_fidelity 0.440; correct side 2/5 both arms; lean closer on 4/5 questions (BoJ 0.190-vs-0.608, Wale 0.319-vs-0.708, Hormuz 0.782-vs-0.784, Banxico 0.053-vs-0.073), worse on 1 (visionOS 0.340-vs-0.028); the single lean-worse flip is mirrored by an equal-and-opposite full-fidelity flip (BoJ); no systematic degradation. Per task ss24: five questions are an architecture/performance diagnostic, no accuracy claim

prediction_changes_are_explainable.evidence: every paired divergence traces to the disclosed probability_source layer selected by each arm's resolved rollout mass (documented per question in exp109_comparison.json rows and LEAN_FINAL_REPORT ss27 answer 20)

actor_calls_tokens_cost_or_time_fall_mat.evidence: arm totals: 20,058 -> 1,052 calls (19x); 31.1M -> 2.15M tokens (14.5x); $7.96 -> $0.66 (12x); 2,375 -> 134 min (17.7x); per-question call reductions 93-96%

unstable_questions_correctly_escalate.evidence: BoJ and Hormuz refused early particle stopping (full 108/108 and 111/111 budgets); structural disagreement spread > 0.10 forced full budgets; 69 staged-cognition escalations recorded with reasons; capped execution-replicate stability probe ran on all five; underidentification reported, never averaged away

full_fidelity_escalation_remains_availab.evidence: execution_profile='full_fidelity' is byte-for-byte the PR-#127 runtime (parity-tested), selectable per call or via SWM_EXECUTION_PROFILE; lean escalates internally to the staged pipeline on recorded triggers

decision: ALL SEVEN CONDITIONS PASS -> world_model_v2 defaults to execution_profile='lean_adaptive'; 'full_fidelity' remains the explicit research-grade option (unified_runtime.DEFAULT_EXECUTION_PROFILE)
scoring_integrity: recovered probabilities served by the precedence ladder: native ensemble fields > runtime per-model recovery blocks mixed by the runtime's own rule > artifact recomputation; recovered_by recorded per row; discrepancies disclosed (see exp110_recovered_forecasts.json)
